Title: The Great Gatsby
Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
First Edition Indicators: "Published April, 1925" on copyright page; no later printings listed.
Points of Issue: lowercase "j" in "jay gatsby" on back of dust jacket

Title: The Hobbit
Author: J.R.R. Tolkien
First Edition Indicators: 1st printing has no mention of later impressions; "George Allen & Unwin" at foot of title page.
Points of Issue: Typo "Dodgeson" instead of "Dodgson" on back flap.

Title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland
Author: Lewis Carroll
First Edition Indicators: "Appleton" or "Macmillan" title page; no later printings listed on verso.
Points of Issue: Critical: Page 192 line 10 must read "wabe" (correct). If it says "wade" it is a later common printing.
